Health.description: Controller operating mode and active faults. mode/healthy and the fault summaries mirror the MQTT system-state snapshot's `controller` and `faults`.

mode.description: normal = all loops nominal; degraded = a non-critical fault is active; interlock = a safety interlock is overriding control (controller spec §7).

healthy.description: False when any active fault is present.

faults.description: Active fault summaries; empty when healthy.

ts.description: When this health snapshot was produced (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

FaultSummary.description: A single active fault (mirrors the MQTT fault-event / system-state fault summary).

component.description: Identifier of the faulted sensor, actuator, or subsystem (e.g. temperature, humidity, co2, par, soil_moisture, irrigation_valve).

zone_id.description: Zone for a zone-local fault; null for a house-level fault.

fault_type.description: Closed set of fault conditions; kept in sync with the MQTT fault-event contract. Includes the actuator-health faults actuator_stuck / actuator_no_response / setpoint_unreachable (controller safety spec §5).

severity.description: warning = degraded but operating; alarm = safety-interlock or loss-of-trust condition.
